mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, address_id, consignee, phone, address_detail, total_amount, discount_amount, pay_amount, pay_status, order_status, create_time, update_time, logistics_company, logistics_no) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{addressId}, #{consignee}, #{phone}, #{addressDetail}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{orderStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{logisticsCompany}, #{logisticsNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, address_id = #{addressId}, consignee = #{consignee}, phone = #{phone}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, pay_status = #{payStatus}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, transaction_id = #{transactionId}, pay_method = #{payMethod}, pay_time = #{payTime}, ship_time = #{shipTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, logistics_company = #{logisticsCompany}, logistics_no = #{logisticsNo} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, address_id, consignee, phone, address_detail, total_amount, discount_amount, pay_amount, pay_status, order_status, transaction_id, pay_method, pay_time, ship_time, complete_time, cancel_time, create_time, update_time, logistics_company, logistics_no FROM orders WHERE id = #{orderId}

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, address_id, consignee, phone, address_detail, total_amount, discount_amount, pay_amount, pay_status, order_status, create_time, update_time, logistics_company, logistics_no FROM orders WHERE order_status = 0 AND pay_status = 0 AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM orders WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND order_status != 4
SELECT COUNT(1) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM orders WHERE YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND order_status != 4
SELECT COUNT(1) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM orders WHERE order_status != 4
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM orders WHERE order_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM orders WHERE order_status = 1
